source_story_zh: 《诗经》被称为中国最早的诗歌总集，是因为它汇集西周至春秋时期的诗篇，保存了礼乐、劳动和婚恋等生活声音。
它把《诗经》诗歌总集地位放回作者、时代、体裁和读者经验之中。
作品中的语言并不只是表达意思，也保存节奏、声音和情感温度。
人物、景物、叙事和抒情相互配合，使文学记忆能够跨越很长时间。
如果只记住书名，人们容易忽略作品形成的时代背景和传播方式。
西周春秋也说明，经典常在具体句子里保存复杂的人生感受。

en: the Shijing as an early poetry collection
the Shijing as an early poetry collection guide
vi: Kinh Thi như tổng tập thơ sớm

zh: 《诗经》为什么是中国最早的诗歌总集？
《诗经》诗歌总集地位应该从哪些方面理解？
en: Why Is the Shijing China’s Earliest Poetry Collection?
How should learners understand the Shijing as an early poetry collection?
vi: Vì sao Kinh Thi là tổng tập thơ sớm nhất của Trung Quốc?
th: ทำไมซือจิงจึงเป็นรวมบทกวีที่เก่าแก่ที่สุดของจีน?
id: Mengapa Shijing menjadi kumpulan puisi paling awal di Tiongkok?

bluf.zh: 《诗经》被称为中国最早的诗歌总集，是因为它汇集西周至春秋时期的诗篇，保存了礼乐、劳动和婚恋等生活声音。
bluf.en: The Shijing is called China’s earliest poetry collection because it gathers poems from the Western Zhou to Spring and Autumn period and preserves voices of ritual, work, and love.
bluf.vi: Kinh Thi được gọi là tổng tập thơ sớm nhất vì gom thơ từ Tây Chu đến Xuân Thu, lưu tiếng nói lễ nhạc, lao động và tình yêu.
bluf.th: ซือจิงถูกเรียกว่าเป็นรวมบทกวีเก่าแก่ที่สุดของจีน เพราะรวบบทจากสมัยโจวตะวันตกถึงชุนชิว และเก็บเสียงของพิธี การทำงาน และความรัก
bluf.id: Shijing disebut kumpulan puisi paling awal karena menghimpun puisi dari Zhou Barat hingga Musim Semi-Gugur dan menyimpan suara ritus, kerja, dan cinta.

内容保持中立学习语气，避开现实政治、民族争议、领土争议和成人性内容。

sentences.pinyin: shī jīng bèi chēng wéi zhōng guó zuì zǎo de shī gē zǒng jí shì yīn wèi tā huì jí xī zhōu zhì chūn qiū shí qī de shī piān bǎo cún le lǐ yuè láo dòng hé hūn liàn děng shēng huó shēng yīn
sentences.content_zh: 《诗经》被称为中国最早的诗歌总集，是因为它汇集西周至春秋时期的诗篇，保存了礼乐、劳动和婚恋等生活声音。
sentences.content_en: The Shijing is called China’s earliest poetry collection because it gathers poems from the Western Zhou to Spring and Autumn period and preserves voices of ritual, work, and love.
sentences.content_vi: Kinh Thi được gọi là tổng tập thơ sớm nhất vì gom thơ từ Tây Chu đến Xuân Thu, lưu tiếng nói lễ nhạc, lao động và tình yêu.
sentences.content_th: ซือจิงถูกเรียกว่าเป็นรวมบทกวีเก่าแก่ที่สุดของจีน เพราะรวบบทจากสมัยโจวตะวันตกถึงชุนชิว และเก็บเสียงของพิธี การทำงาน และความรัก
sentences.content_id: Shijing disebut kumpulan puisi paling awal karena menghimpun puisi dari Zhou Barat hingga Musim Semi-Gugur dan menyimpan suara ritus, kerja, dan cinta.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ shī jīng shī gē zǒng jí dì wèi fàng huí zuò zhě shí dài tǐ cái hé dú zhě jīng yàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把《诗经》诗歌总集地位放回作者、时代、体裁和读者经验之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the Shijing as an early poetry collection back among authors, eras, genres, and reader experience.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt Kinh Thi như tổng tập thơ sớm trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพาซือจิงในฐานะรวมบทกวียุคต้นกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan Shijing sebagai kumpulan puisi awal kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: zuò pǐn zhōng de yǔ yán bìng bù zhǐ shì biǎo dá yì sī yě bǎo cún jié zòu shēng yīn hé qíng gǎn wēn dù
sentences.content_zh: 作品中的语言并不只是表达意思，也保存节奏、声音和情感温度。
sentences.content_en: Literary language does more than convey meaning; it also preserves rhythm, sound, and emotional warmth.
sentences.content_vi: Ngôn ngữ, hình ảnh, hành động và cảm xúc cùng tạo nên kinh nghiệm có thể ghi nhớ.
sentences.content_th: ภาษา ภาพ การกระทำ และความรู้สึกร่วมกันสร้างประสบการณ์ที่จดจำได้
sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.pinyin: rén wù jǐng wù xù shì hé shū qíng xiāng hù pèi hé shǐ wén xué jì yì néng gòu kuà yuè hěn cháng shí jiān
sentences.content_zh: 人物、景物、叙事和抒情相互配合，使文学记忆能够跨越很长时间。
sentences.content_en: Characters, scenes, narration, and lyric feeling work together so literary memory can last for a long time.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī jì zhù shū míng rén men róng yì hū lüè zuò pǐn xíng chéng de shí dài bèi jǐng hé chuán bō fāng shì
sentences.content_zh: 如果只记住书名，人们容易忽略作品形成的时代背景和传播方式。
sentences.content_en: If people only remember titles, they may miss the historical background and transmission of the works.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: xī zhōu chūn qiū yě shuō míng jīng diǎn cháng zài jù tǐ jù zi lǐ bǎo cún fù zá de rén shēng gǎn shòu
sentences.content_zh: 西周春秋也说明，经典常在具体句子里保存复杂的人生感受。
sentences.content_en: Western Zhou to Spring and Autumn also shows how classics preserve complex life feelings in concrete sentences.

sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.content_vi: Những nội dung này tiếp tục truyền qua lớp học, sách chú giải, kể chuyện và đối thoại hằng ngày.
sentences.content_th: เนื้อหาเหล่านี้ยังส่งต่อผ่านห้องเรียน หนังสืออธิบาย การเล่าเรื่อง และบทสนทนาประจำวัน
sentences.content_id: Isi seperti ini terus diwariskan melalui kelas, komentar, cerita, dan percakapan harian.

sentences.pinyin: dāng dài yuè dú kě yǐ xiān zhuā zhù huà miàn hé qíng xù zài màn màn lǐ jiě gé lǜ diǎn gù hé wén tǐ biàn huà
sentences.content_zh: 当代阅读可以先抓住画面和情绪，再慢慢理解格律、典故和文体变化。
sentences.content_en: Contemporary reading can begin with images and emotions before moving to form, allusion, and genre change.
sentences.content_vi: Trong đời sống hiện đại, cần hiểu nghĩa cũ rồi so sánh với tình huống mới.
sentences.content_th: ในชีวิตสมัยใหม่ ควรเข้าใจความหมายเดิมแล้วค่อยเปรียบกับสถานการณ์ใหม่
sentences.content_id: Dalam kehidupan modern, makna lama perlu dipahami lalu dibandingkan dengan keadaan baru.

sentences.pinyin: bǎ zuò zhě jīng yàn shí dài huán jìng hé wén běn xíng shì lián qǐ lái wén xué jiù bú zài zhǐ shì gū lì míng piān
sentences.content_zh: 把作者经验、时代环境和文本形式连起来，文学就不再只是孤立名篇。
sentences.content_en: When author experience, historical setting, and textual form are linked, literature is no longer isolated famous works.
sentences.content_vi: Khi đặt văn bản, câu chuyện và thực hành cạnh nhau, truyền thống trở nên dễ hiểu hơn.
sentences.content_th: เมื่อนำตัวบท เรื่องเล่า และการปฏิบัติมาไว้ด้วยกัน ประเพณีจะเข้าใจง่ายขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.pinyin: yīn cǐ yǔ yán gǔ pǔ bù jǐn shì zhī shi diǎn yě bāng zhù rén men lǐ jiě shī jīng shī gē zǒng jí dì wèi
sentences.content_zh: 因此，语言古朴不仅是知识点，也帮助人们理解《诗经》诗歌总集地位。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, ancient plain language is not only a knowledge point but also a way to understand the Shijing as an early poetry collection.
sentences.content_vi: Vì vậy, nội dung này giúp người học hôm nay hiểu Kinh Thi như tổng tập thơ sớm rõ hơn.

sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami Shijing sebagai kumpulan puisi awal dengan lebih jelas.

sentences.pinyin: hòu shì yǐn yòng shì lǐ jiě shī jīng shī gē zǒng jí dì wèi de zhòng yào wén xué miàn xiàng
sentences.content_zh: 后世引用是理解《诗经》诗歌总集地位的重要文学面向。
sentences.content_en: later quotation is an important literary aspect for understanding the Shijing as an early poetry collection.
sentences.content_vi: Phần này là điểm quan trọng để hiểu Kinh Thi như tổng tập thơ sớm.
sentences.content_th: ส่วนนี้เป็นจุดสำคัญในการเข้าใจซือจิงในฐานะรวมบทกวียุคต้น
sentences.content_id: Bagian ini penting untuk memahami Shijing sebagai kumpulan puisi awal.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ shī jīng shī gē zǒng jí dì wèi fàng huí zuò zhě shí dài tǐ cái hé dú zhě jīng yàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把《诗经》诗歌总集地位放回作者、时代、体裁和读者经验之中。

sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan Shijing sebagai kumpulan puisi awal kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.content_zh: 因此，文学源头不仅是知识点，也帮助人们理解《诗经》诗歌总集地位。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, literary source is not only a knowledge point but also a way to understand the Shijing as an early poetry collection.
sentences.content_vi: Vì vậy, nội dung này giúp người học hôm nay hiểu Kinh Thi như tổng tập thơ sớm rõ hơn.
sentences.content_th: ดังนั้นเนื้อหานี้ช่วยให้ผู้เรียนวันนี้เข้าใจซือจิงในฐานะรวมบทกวียุคต้นได้ชัดเจนขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami Shijing sebagai kumpulan puisi awal dengan lebih jelas.
